entity.country_or_origin: BNB Chain, World Chain, Berachain, Solana, and multichain ecosystems
entity.summary: Multichain decentralized trading platform combining a DEX aggregator for spot swaps with a perpetual decentralized exchange, wallet-integrated trading, liquidity routing, and cross-chain ecosystem deployments.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Holdstation as a live multichain DeFi trading ecosystem. HEI models Holdstation Swap, the Holdstation DEX Aggregator, and Holdstation DeFutures as one exchange entity rather than separate product entities.

evidence.title: Welcome to Holdstation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Holdstation as a live trading platform spanning perpetual decentralized exchange functionality, multichain swaps, web trading, and wallet-based trading across multiple ecosystems.

evidence.title: What is Holdstation Dex
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies the Holdstation DEX Aggregator as a multichain decentralized exchange aggregator that routes across multiple liquidity sources and supports direct website and wallet swaps.

evidence.title: Holdstation DeFutures
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes DeFutures as Holdstation's perpetual decentralized exchange product with leveraged trading, AI Matching Pool infrastructure, USD1 collateral support, and multichain ecosystem coverage.
